Web Service Endpoint# GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/secondaryCategory

App Store Connect API 3.6+## [URL](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-appinfos-_id_-relationships-secondarycategory#url)



```
GET https://api.appstoreconnect.apple.com/v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/secondaryCategory
```

`id``string` (Required)
